_comment: Example OpenHands Stop hook for Agentflow. Copy/adapt key names to your OpenHands version. Contract: run the script, treat a non-zero exit as 'block completion'. See docs/stop-hook.md.

stop.name: agentflow-proof-gate
stop.description: Block session completion until the Agentflow proof chain (verify-run -> build-proof -> verify-proof) passes. Exits 0 when no plan is locked, so it is safe in ungoverned repos.
